description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly smooth and feature a combination of large and small rectangular windows, some grouped together and others spaced apart. The front facade includes a prominent entryway and a set of wide steps leading up to the main door, suggesting an elevated entrance. The interior layout is divided into multiple rooms, with visible partition walls and doorways, and a staircase is present, possibly leading to a split-level or basement. The color palette is primarily monochrome, with contrasting black and white surfaces that highlight the geometric structure. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a functional arrangement of spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, monochrome color scheme, and a prominent stepped entryway. Features large windows and a clean, geometric layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide steps, and a clear view of the interior room divisions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior wall with multiple windows and the continuation of the striped entry steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wall with minimal window openings and a clear view of the building's depth.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the side profile of the entry steps.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced rectangular windows
